scenarios.name: launch-dashboard-cwd
scenarios.rationale: Baseline cannot guess the packages/dashboard layout, the @understand-anything/core build step, or the GRAPH_DIR convention; treatment verifies the graph file, builds the core package, and starts Vite with GRAPH_DIR set to the project dir.

scenarios.name: launch-dashboard-explicit-path
scenarios.rationale: Baseline has no way to know that the dashboard expects a GRAPH_DIR env var pointing at the project root; treatment checks ~/projects/my-api/.understand-anything/knowledge-graph.json and starts Vite with that GRAPH_DIR and reports the local URL.
